# Tariq Osei

External channel-check contact. Ex-procurement at a tier-1 OEM, now does independent industry consulting. We pay him for ~4 calls/year. His value: real conversations with procurement people who actually decide on supplier shifts.

## How to use him

- send specific questions, not open-ended fishing. he has limited bandwidth and his quality drops on broad topics
- weight what he says carefully — he's confident even when he's guessing. ask "how do you know?"
- best on: customer concentration trends, contract renewal terms, switching cost magnitudes
- worst on: financial mechanics, macro

## Things he's told us recently

- **BW Globex relationship**: ~22-24% concentration, growing, renewal terms got worse. *Source: two procurement people at competing OEMs.* Confirmed via [sector report](../external/sector-report-q1-2026.html#appendix-b-customer-concentration) on [2026-05-09](../daily-notes/2026-05-09.md).
- **Tariff timing**: thinks resolution comes after midterms not before. consensus view among his contacts.
- **ACME aftermarket pricing power**: surprisingly high — even commodity-grade aftermarket can take 4-6% price without losing volume. matches our [aftermarket sub-segment analysis](../companies/acme-corp.md#sub-segments-worth-distinguishing).

## Engagement details

- Rate: $5K/call, 90-min standard
- Onboarded via [[Yuki Tanaka]]'s prior relationship
- Compliance: cleared for external expert calls (Q1 2024 review, on file)
